dialogos.texto_en: The festival will end soon.
It's the school festival, the final event,\nwhich I had decided to enjoy to the fullest.
Three days passed in the blink of an eye,\nand the after-party is already in its final stage.
So many things happened.
Our class division, and reconciliation.\nWhat happened with Nino and her father.\nYotsuba pushed herself too hard and collapsed...
I never thought even the quintuplets'\nbiological father would show up.\nIt was too much to handle in such a short time.
However, it's not over yet.
I really love you five.
I hope we can stay in this same relationship forever,\nthe six of us.
That said, I think I need to work out a solution.
Nevertheless, I don't want to be rude\nby bringing this up during such a festival.\nI haven't sorted out my own feelings yet either.
Please give me until the final day.
Uesugi-kun, there's something else I want to tell you.
What is it?
You said it on the first day, right?\nThat you have to work out a solution,\nbut to give you until the final day.
Yeah.
Regarding that matter,\nI have a proposal for you as well.
Huh?
By the time the after-party is over,\nthe five of us will go to our classrooms\nwithin the school, and wait for your answer there.
What?!
And we each have different classrooms...
Wait a minute! You guys don't have to go that far!
We discussed it and decided on this.\nBesides, what you should truly be concerned about\nis what comes next, Uesugi-kun...
You will go to just one classroom.
We understand that this proposal\nmay actually be trouble for you.
But we are resolved in our actions.\nPlease understand that.
Was this choice, or should we say,\nmaking this choice, the right one?
Three days are far too short to even think about that.
Even so%p-2;――
With this, the Asahi High School Festival\nand after-party have come to an end.
